title: Serene Shrubbery (Fabric)
description: Create lush gardens with new flowers and plants! Fabric Port!
body:
**A small mod that aims to liven up the natural and floral aspects of Minecraft. Its main focus is to give the player the ability to create flourishing gardens. Currently, there are 10 types of flowers some of which have multiple color variants you can collect!**

## Flower Breeding Some flowers are able to be cross-pollinated together to create new color variants! Just place the two or three flowers right next to each other and patiently wait for nature to take its course! To see which flowers can breed together, check out the Flower Breeding Chart uploaded in the image gallery! This mechanic is currently in early stages of development and will become a lot more refined in later updates!

## Bloom Baskets The Bloom Basket is a new decorative block that functions similarly to a flower pot! It can be crafted using any 3 wooden planks, any type of dirt, and 3 sticks on top! Like so: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd8b57a050606d48336e9f1e4ffbab245cbb3c6.png)

Currently, only the Pansy flower and all its corresponding colors can be placed inside a Bloom Basket. Right-clicking an occupied Bloom Basket with an empty hand will remove the flower planted inside. Shift + Right-clicking on an occupied Bloom Basket will allow the player to pick it up with the flower still planted inside! ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb6b260cc7cec71224a68834b4dfa0c927d4ee7f_0.webp)

## Wiki You can find the wiki [here](https://cozystudios.org/serene-shrubbery/intro/) on how the mod and flower breeding works!

## Credits All credits to the original mod author [Ryukusu](https://modrinth.com/user/Ryukusu) and thank you to him for allowing me to port this mod to Fabric! Pixel Art Logo: [Goober](https://modrinth.com/user/gooberexe) and [Souffle](https://souffleee.carrd.co/)
